# Test all production endpoints one final time with full HTTP status codes
echo "ENDPOINT TEST RESULTS:"
echo "======================"

test_endpoint() {
  local url="$1"
  local label="$2"
  local method="${3:-GET}"
  local data="${4:-}"
  
  if [ "$method" = "POST" ]; then
    CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$url" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$data" 2>&1)
  else
    CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp.txt -w "%{http_code}" "$url" 2>&1)
  fi
  SIZE=$(wc -c < /tmp/resp.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo "$label | $url | HTTP $CODE | ${SIZE}B"
}
